text:
Grammar  Tip –  “I  Want  To”  (–고  싶어요)
Structure: [Verb stem] + 고 싶어요.

Examples:
	•	가고 싶어요 → I want to go.
	•	먹고 싶어요 → I want to eat.
	•	배우고 싶어요 → I want to learn.

Learn more at knowkoreanculture.

text:
When asking for something, attach –주세요 to a noun.

[Noun] + 주세요 = Please give me [Noun].

Example:
물 주세요. → Please give me water.

Learn more at - www.skool.com/kultura-keys...

<CHS 특별 학술 강연>
